description_long: This is a metallic cup with a dark bronze or copper finish, featuring embossed decorative elements and branding. The front side displays the 'LEAGUE OF LEGENDS' logo in raised lettering, along with a crest or emblem beneath it. Other sides of the cup are adorned with intricate, raised motifs, including a stylized serpent-like symbol and a detailed figure of a character in elaborate attire. The cup has a cylindrical shape with a slightly faceted exterior, giving it a robust and ornamental appearance. The surface is hard and has a slightly worn, matte metallic sheen, suggesting durability and a collectible or commemorative purpose. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids.
description: A dark bronze metallic cup with embossed League of Legends branding and decorative motifs, including a character and stylized symbols. The surface is hard, matte, and slightly worn, giving it a collectible look.
description_view_0: The cup's front features the 'LEAGUE OF LEGENDS' logo and a crest emblem, both embossed and prominent.
description_view_1: This side displays a large, raised stylized serpent-like symbol, with no text visible.
description_view_2: A detailed embossed figure of a character in ornate attire is visible, adding a unique decorative element.
description_view_3: Another view of the stylized serpent-like symbol, similar to view 1, with part of the character motif visible on the edge.
